docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $572.98 FILED BY SEARS ROEBUCK AND COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT OCHOA ROSEMARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
